title: Bullpadel Iconic Power Diamond-Shaped Padel Racket, White/Multi
description: The IONIC POWER is a highly manoeuvrable and efficient diamond-shaped racket with a medium balance and featuring the new XForce system. This racket is a perfect combination of power and control, designed for demanding players looking to maximise their performance on the court. It stands out for its diamond shape, which favours powerful and precise shots, ideal for those who enjoy an offensive style of play. Made with advanced materials such as Glaphite, which combines fiberglass and carbon, it ensures exceptional durability and lightweight, comfortable handling.
